---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new behavior or ask for something to change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you want**
<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature -->

**Why**
<!-- The problem it solves or the workflow it enables. "I want X" is fine; "I want X because Y" is better. -->

**Proposed shape**
<!-- Optional. If you have a specific design in mind (keybinding, CLI flag, config option), describe it. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Optional. Anything you tried first, or adjacent features that almost-but-not-quite fit. -->
